items.name: Rechtesteek
items.description: Russian-speaking owner, small-group classes. Friendly atmosphere for all levels.

items.name: Studio ZIP
items.schedule: Weekly lessons, evenings; max 6 per group
items.description: Sewing studio offering weekly lessons, private classes, workshops, and a professional fashion program. One of the few studios with dedicated English-language classes.

items.name: Folk + Fiber
items.schedule: Workshops (2.5h, max 5 people) and drop-in Sewing Café sessions
items.description: Bright studio in Haarlem with beginner workshops, a one-day intro to sewing, and open Sewing Café sessions where you can use their machines and serger.

items.name: Naai Atelier Amsterdam
items.schedule: Weekend workshops and weekday evening classes
items.description: Well-equipped studio offering beginner through advanced dressmaking. Machine hire available.
